title: The Struggle Is Real T-Rex Phone Funny T-Shirt
description: Meet our frustrated T-Rex trying to text with his tiny arms. We all know the feeling - when technology defeats us despite our best efforts. This hilarious dinosaur design perfectly captures 'The Struggle Is Real' in prehistoric form. Perfect gift for anyone who relates to technological fails, dinosaur lovers, or people who just need a good laugh. High quality print on soft, comfortable shirts that become instant conversation starters. Join the ranks of BanterWearCo customers who proudly wear their struggles. Because sometimes admitting defeat is the funniest option. 🦖📱
imagePrompt: Clean vector illustration of a frustrated cartoon T-Rex with tiny arms trying to use a modern smartphone. The dinosaur has an annoyed expression with sweat drops. Bold centered text in impact font reads 'The Struggle Is Real'. High contrast design that works on both black and white shirts, professional POD quality, clean vector style with bold outlines for maximum readability, limited color palette (vibrant greens, deep blacks, bright yellows), minimalist background. Humorous, relatable meme style perfect for premium t-shirt printing. Sharp lines, excellent negative space, commercial quality graphic design.
printReadyPrompt: Production-ready vector design of frustrated T-Rex with tiny arms holding smartphone. Bold sans-serif text 'THE STRUGGLE IS REAL' with white outline for visibility on dark shirts. High contrast color scheme (forest green dinosaur, black outlines, bright yellow accents). Clean lines suitable for screen printing and DTG. Transparent background version available. Optimized for both light and dark garments with strategic color placement.
humorStyle: relatable millennial struggle with dinosaur twist
trendingAngle: Classic 'struggle is real' meme updated with beloved dinosaur character
colorStrategy: Vibrant green T-Rex with heavy black outlines ensures visibility on both white and black shirts. Bright yellow text with white outline provides maximum contrast. The design relies on strong silhouettes and bold text rather than subtle details.

title: Nobody Needs This Much Coffee Funny Morning Person Shirt
description: For those of us who require industrial quantities of coffee just to function as a human being. This design features a cartoon person drowning in an ocean of coffee with the text 'Nobody Needs This Much Coffee... But Here We Are'. A perfect self-roasting shirt for caffeine addicts, night owls, and anyone who can't start their day without their liquid life support. Part of the BanterWearCo 'Nobody Needs This Much' series that includes our famous baby oil shower curtain. Soft, high-quality fabric that survives countless wash cycles while keeping the laughs coming.
imagePrompt: Minimalist vector graphic showing a cartoon person submerged in a giant coffee cup with only their head and arms visible holding a tiny coffee cup. Bold text across the top reads 'Nobody Needs This Much Coffee'. High contrast design optimized for both light and dark shirts, clean vector aesthetic, professional POD quality, warm brown and black color scheme with white highlights for readability. Humorous and relatable style with excellent negative space. Commercial quality graphic suitable for premium apparel.
printReadyPrompt: Production-ready design featuring overwhelmed person in giant coffee cup. Bold condensed sans-serif text 'NOBODY NEEDS THIS MUCH COFFEE' with strong outline. Rich coffee browns, deep blacks, and crisp whites. Design uses heavy outlines and strategic color blocking to ensure visibility on both black and white garments. Clean lines optimized for both screen printing and direct-to-garment printing.
humorStyle: self-deprecating addiction humor in the style of the baby oil design
trendingAngle: Continuation of the popular 'Nobody Needs This Much' series from the store
colorStrategy: Rich coffee tones with heavy black outlines and white text highlights ensure the design pops on both light and dark backgrounds. The contrast between the dark coffee sea and light highlights creates natural separation that works across all shirt colors.
